nasb.text: They kept beating His head with a reed, and spitting on Him, and kneeling and bowing before Him.

esv.text: And they were striking his head with a reed and spitting on him and kneeling down in homage to him.

cnv.text: 又用一根蘆葦打他的頭，向他吐唾沫，並且跪下來拜他。

ccb.text: 他们用苇秆打祂的头，向祂吐唾沫，跪拜祂。

csbs.text: 他们用芦苇打他的头，向他吐唾沫，又跪下来拜他。
